ground_truth.title: Pest Control Queen Creek - Budget Brothers Termite & Pest Control
ground_truth.main_content:
Pest Control Services for Queen Creek, Arizona

Top Rated Pest Control Company in Queen Creek
Budget Brothers Termite & Pest Control is a trusted, family-owned company proudly serving Queen Creek, AZ, for more than 25 years. Known for our commitment to customer satisfaction, we specialize in tackling the unique pest challenges found across Arizona. From routine pest control to detailed termite inspections and treatments, our team delivers effective solutions to help protect Queen Creek homes and businesses. With a focus on both innovation and affordability, Budget Brothers continues to provide reliable, budget-conscious pest control services tailored to the needs of the Queen Creek community.

Pest Control & Termite Services in Queen Creek
Family Owned and Operated Business that has Operated Throughout the Valley for 25 Years.

Mosquitos
No one enjoys mosquitos invading their space. Let us get rid of them for you.

Flys
Pesky flies terrorizing your home? We have the solution.

Hornets
Need to rid your home of dangerous hornets? We have the solution.

Cicadas
Dealing with loud cicadas in your yard? We have solutions to get rid of them.

Crickets
Noisy crickets infesting your property? Leave it to us to get them under control.

Scorpions
Scorpions can enter your home a variety of ways. Let us protect your home with our proven solutions.

Pigeons
Birds and pigeons more specifically, can be a pest to your home. We can stop them from being a burden.

Ants
Ants infesting your Arizona home? Leave it to us to scare them away.

Spiders
Budget Brothers offers spider elimination services for your home.

Cockroaches
Cockroaches are a fact of life. But that doesn't mean you have to live with them.

Rodents
Let us inspect your home to find the source of rats invading and stop them from future visits in your home.

Bees & Wasps
Bee or Wasp problem? No problem! We offer options for bee hive or wasp removal in Arizona.

Bed Bugs
Bed bug elimination is what we do. We offer safe solutions for your bed bug problems in Arizona.

Termites
We offer termite control and termite inspection services all over the Valley.

Budget Brothers Pest Control offers affordable monthly service plans tailored to the needs of Queen Creek homeowners and businesses. Recognizing that consistent pest control is essential for a safe, comfortable space, we provide cost-effective services without cutting corners on quality. Each monthly visit includes a detailed inspection and targeted treatment for common Arizona pests like ants, roaches, and spiders—helping stop infestations before they start. Our proactive approach not only keeps properties protected but also lowers the risk of future pest problems. With Budget Brothers, Queen Creek residents get dependable, high-quality pest control that fits their budget.

Explore Our Monthly Pest Control Plans for Homes and Businesses

BUDGET BROTHER CUSTOMER REVIEWS
Hear From Past Clients
Don’t take our word for it. Hear from past clients who have trusted Budget Brothers Pest Control

Amber Foley
Budget brothers has been servicing my home for over 5 years and I’m always impressed with the techs that come out. Vaughn has been our routine tech for almost a year now and he is an absolute kindhearted rockstar. Quick, efficient and reliable.

Ale J.
Love Budget Bros! Started using them after another company put me under contract without telling me. They’re affordable and do a great job. Vaughn has been a great technician and I’ll definitely be sticking with them for a long time.

R.R.
Today, Jesse came and did the initial spray for our new place. He was friendly and gave some great pointers! This company was referred to us by a friend and I’m glad I chose them to begin our bi monthly plan to keep annoying bugs out of the house and property! Their prices are very affordable and I like how they have different plans to choose from! Thank you!

Andrew T.
James called 30 early to ask my permission to arrive and start early. That was a great surprise. He quickly began inspecting and gave me answers to every question I had before I could even ask them. Very knowledgeable and helpful. Staff on the phone was kind and helpful as well. Excellent service, worth every penny.

Ken E.
Great company to work with. Good value. Been using for quite a few years with no complaints. Switched to them from Bulwark when we had termites and could not get Bulwark to quote me on termite work. They call with service reminders the day before coming.
Mike is very detailed and takes care of everything without being told when he comes.

Matthew H.
Budget Bros. tech Brett showed up on time and was cordial. He was thorough in treating the property and followed up to confirm we had no issues with pests. He left traps in the garage as a precaution and let me know he didn’t see any infestations during his treatment.
We have been very happy with the service we have been getting from BB over the past year. The techs are professional and knowledgeable and the price is competitive. We have not had any major pest issues since we first called them out.

FAQ’s
Frequently Asked Questions
Your pest control questions answered by us!

How long does it take for pest control to work?
It depends case-by-case. Certain pests take longer to deal with than others, and certain homes are larger and more complicated to service than others. Some treatments may only take 30 minutes while others may take up to 8 hours depending on the severity and type of treatment that is needed.

How much is pest control service?
Our prices range start at $39 and rise from there. We also provide cost-effective monthly service plans to keep your costs low and how or business routinely free of pests.

Is pest control safe for my family and pets?
Absolutely. Safety is our top priority. We use eco-friendly products that are safe for pets and families. We do recommend keeping pets and people away from treated areas until everything has dried or as directed by our technician.

How long does a pest control treatment last?
The effectiveness of each treatment depends on the type of pest and the method used. In most cases, results last from one month to several months. For lasting protection, we recommend regular maintenance visits.

What are signs that I have termites?
Common signs of termites include hollow-sounding wood when tapped, visible mud tubes along walls, wood, or crawl spaces, and the appearance of discarded wings or termite droppings (also known as frass).

Contact Budget Brother’s Termite & Pest Control Today
Putting Pests in Their Place – Outside!
